evidence_items.snippet: Ibuprofen (500 mM) caused a rapid and reversible inhibition of Isc. After washout of ibuprofen and relief of associated inhibition, the Isc was inhibited by bumetanide, confirming the Cl2 secretory nature of the response. The effect of ibuprofen on cAMP-dependent Cl2 secretion in primary cultures of murine tracheal and human bronchial epithelia...
